tagline: Spreadsheet-class grid — keyboard cell navigation + inline editing.
whenToUse: Use Data Grid for spreadsheet-class editing: APG grid keyboard navigation (single tab stop, roving cell focus, arrow keys), inline cell editors, and column resize/reorder/pin. It is a distinct role="grid" implementation, not Table with extra props — reach for it only when those interactions are needed. For a read-and-select record list use Table, and for pure scale over a large dataset use Virtual Table.
